subject: B727
body:
Trump's B727 sold for 2.7M,.
Sean very discussed with me this company was interested, unless he call you,.

Best regards,
Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T

subject: B727
body: This buyer did have specs on your aircraft. They were looking at a 3.0 million budget but did not make an offer and it was too low. We did discuss it
